module.name: hal_flash_base
module.brief: Common base class for flash devices.
module.details: This abstract class implements the generic flash interface and provides common state handling and helper functions for flash device drivers.

typedef.name: BaseFlash
typedef.brief: Type of a flash base driver class (legacy).

class.name: hal_flash_base
class.brief: Base class of all flash drivers.

method.name: __flash_read
method.param: Number of bytes to be read.

method.name: __flash_program
method.param: Number of bytes to be programmed.

method.name: __flash_query_erase
method.brief: Queries the driver for erase operation progress.
method.param: Recommended time, in milliseconds, before retrying, can be @p NULL.

method.name: __flash_verify_erase
method.brief: Returns the erase state of a sector.

method.name: flashWaitErase
method.brief: Waits until the current erase operation is finished.

method.name: flashGetSectorOffset
method.brief: Returns the offset of a sector.

method.name: flashGetSectorSize
method.brief: Returns the size of a sector.

method.name: flashGetOffsetSector
method.brief: Returns the sector containing an offset.

method.name: flashGetOffsetAddress
method.brief: Gets an absolute address from a flash offset.
method.note: Meaningful only for memory mapped devices.
method.return: A pointer to the offset address.

method.name: flashGetAddressOffset
method.brief: Gets a flash offset from an absolute address.
method.note: Meaningful only for memory mapped devices.
